bucket_rationale: Intermediate per the bucket rubric: 76 lines in [60, 200] + rules 2 in [2, 5] + agents ≤ 1 + MCP ≤ 1. Pure Rust FFI library (Emacs module bindings) — T2.2 Security SKIP (no network surface). Strong T1 all PASS + strong structure/commands (T3). LAV: +2/+2/+1/+1/0/+1 reflects accurate workspace structure + reliable commands + moderate patterns (changelog/guide-writing skills) + concise length.
